name: Dominion Income Trust 1
analysis: DN1 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$99.7500, stop A$96.3666, target A$109.9002 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
